summary: Comprehensive performance testing infrastructure using k6 to validate system behavior under stress, establish performance baselines, and detect regressions across all microservices

user_stories.i_want: automated load tests that run in CI/CD pipeline
user_stories.so_that: performance regressions are caught before deployment
acceptance_criteria: Load tests execute on every pull request
Results are published as comments on PRs

user_stories.so_that: I can track system performance trends and capacity planning
acceptance_criteria: Grafana dashboard displays p50, p95, p99 latencies
Dashboard shows throughput and error rates over time

user_stories.i_want: predefined test scenarios for each service
user_stories.so_that: I can easily run targeted performance tests
acceptance_criteria: Separate test files for each microservice
Tests can run individually or as a full suite

user_stories.so_that: we have measurable performance guarantees for customers
acceptance_criteria: SLOs documented for each service endpoint

user_stories.so_that: I can validate performance changes before committing

functional_requirements.title: Concurrent User Login Simulation
functional_requirements.description: Simulate multiple users logging in simultaneously to test auth-service capacity and session handling

functional_requirements.title: Parallel Job Submission Test
functional_requirements.description: Submit multiple print jobs concurrently to validate job-service queuing and processing

functional_requirements.title: High-Frequency Heartbeat Simulation
functional_requirements.description: Generate high-volume heartbeat requests from simulated agents to test registry-service scalability

functional_requirements.title: Document Upload Burst Test
functional_requirements.description: Simulate burst document upload patterns to stress storage-service and validate handling

functional_requirements.title: WebSocket Connection Scaling
functional_requirements.description: Test notification-service WebSocket handling with thousands of concurrent connections

functional_requirements.title: Mixed Workload Scenario
functional_requirements.description: Run combined scenarios simulating real-world usage patterns across all services

functional_requirements.title: Performance Baseline Establishment
functional_requirements.description: Capture and store baseline metrics for each service under normal load conditions

functional_requirements.title: Regression Detection
functional_requirements.description: Compare current test results against baselines and flag significant degradations

functional_requirements.title: Performance Dashboard
functional_requirements.description: Create Grafana dashboard visualizing load test results and trends over time

functional_requirements.title: CI Integration
functional_requirements.description: Integrate load tests into GitHub Actions workflow with configurable thresholds

functional_requirements.title: Mobile Print Apps
functional_requirements.description: Native iOS and Android applications with camera scan, document preview, and print release
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential for modern workforce, most competitors have this

functional_requirements.title: Follow-Me Printing
functional_requirements.description: Queue jobs and release at any available printer via card, PIN, or mobile app
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: High-demand enterprise feature for flexible working

functional_requirements.title: DLP Integration
functional_requirements.description: Content inspection, keyword filtering, and redaction before printing

functional_requirements.title: SOC 2 Certification
functional_requirements.description: Complete SOC 2 Type II audit for enterprise trust

non_functional_requirements.metric: < 200ms for all REST endpoints under normal load
50 jobs per second sustained for 5 minutes
Linear performance improvement with additional service instances
< 100ms for 95th percentile of queries under load
Full test suite completes within 15 minutes in CI

risks.risk: Load tests may impact production if misconfigured
risks.mitigation: Enforce environment checks, require explicit --production flag, use dedicated test infrastructure

risks.risk: Test data pollution of production databases
risks.mitigation: Use separate test database, implement data cleanup hooks, prefix test records

risks.risk: False positives from flaky tests blocking deployments
risks.mitigation: Implement retry logic, define acceptable variance ranges, require manual review on failures

risks.risk: Insufficient CI resources causing test failures
risks.mitigation: Use dedicated runners for load tests, set resource limits, implement fallback strategies

risks.risk: Third-party service rate limiting during tests
risks.mitigation: Mock external dependencies, configure rate limits for test accounts, use sandbox environments

risks.risk: WebSocket connection limits in CI environment
risks.mitigation: Use scalable infrastructure, implement connection pooling, set conservative defaults

risks.risk: Performance drift over time making baselines obsolete
risks.mitigation: Schedule periodic baseline recalculation, track baseline age in alerts

risks.risk: Document storage costs from test uploads
risks.mitigation: Configure lifecycle policies for test data, use local storage in tests, cleanup after tests

implementation_phases.name: Infrastructure Setup
tasks: Set up Docker Compose for test environment
Create base test configuration and utilities
Set up k6 operator for Kubernetes

implementation_phases.name: Auth Service Tests
tasks: Establish performance baselines for auth endpoints

implementation_phases.name: Registry Service Tests
tasks: Establish performance baselines for registry endpoints

implementation_phases.name: Job Service Tests
tasks: Establish performance baselines for job endpoints

implementation_phases.name: Storage Service Tests
tasks: Establish performance baselines for storage endpoints

implementation_phases.name: Mixed Workload Scenarios
tasks: Create stress test to failure point

implementation_phases.name: CI/CD Integration
tasks: Create GitHub Actions workflow for load tests

implementation_phases.name: Monitoring and Alerting
tasks: Set up alert rules for SLO violations

implementation_phases.name: Documentation and Handoff
tasks: Create onboarding materials for SRE team

key_gaps: Native mobile applications (iOS/Android) for direct mobile printing
Data Loss Prevention (DLP) and content inspection before print
SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications
Cost center allocation and budget management
unique_selling_points: Open-source with transparent codebase vs proprietary competitors
Microservices architecture enables flexible deployment and scaling
Support for both S3 and local storage - no vendor lock-in
Self-hostable option for data sovereignty requirements
Modern Go-based stack with better performance than legacy solutions
Extensive authentication options (OIDC, SAML, JWT) out of the box
OpenTelemetry integration for observability from day one
